hero.title: Event Tents & Rentals for Oregon Coast Celebrations
hero.subtitle: From weddings and festivals to private parties and corporate events, Pacific North Events & Tents helps bring your vision to life with stylish, reliable, weather-ready event rentals.

intro.body: Planning an outdoor event on the Oregon Coast comes with a unique kind of magic — and a unique kind of weather. Pacific North Events & Tents provides high-quality event tents and rental support designed to keep your celebration comfortable, stylish, and stress-free.

weddings.title: Weddings
weddings.text: Elegant tented spaces for ceremonies, receptions, rehearsal dinners, and coastal wedding weekends.

festivals.title: Festivals & Community
festivals.text: Large-scale tent solutions for markets, music events, fundraisers, fairs, and community celebrations.

privateParties.title: Private Parties
privateParties.text: Comfortable, beautiful setups for birthdays, reunions, graduations, backyard parties, and family gatherings.

corporate.title: Corporate Events
corporate.text: Professional tent and rental solutions for business events, retreats, brand activations, and company gatherings.

weather.title: Built for Coastal Weather
weather.body: Oregon Coast events need more than a pretty setup — they need smart planning, dependable equipment, and shelter that gives guests peace of mind. Our tents help protect your event from sun, wind, and rain while creating a polished space your guests will remember.

small.title: Small Gatherings
small.desc: Backyard parties, intimate dinners, and small celebrations under 50 guests.

medium.title: Medium Events
medium.desc: Receptions and family celebrations for 50–100 guests with seating and food service.

large.title: Large Celebrations
large.desc: Weddings and corporate events for 100–200 guests with dining and dancing.

festival.title: Festival & Vendor Tents
festival.desc: Markets, fairs, and multi-booth setups with weather-ready protection.

wedding.title: Wedding Reception Tents
wedding.desc: Dining, dancing, lounge areas, and elegant outdoor wedding layouts.

custom.title: Custom Event Layouts
custom.desc: Multi-tent setups, vendor rows, weather plans, and full event flow design.

plannerPromo.title: Try Our Free AI Tent Planner
plannerPromo.body: Not sure what size tent, seating layout, or equipment your event needs? Our AI Tent Planner helps you build a custom starting plan based on your guest count, event type, surface, weather exposure, and setup needs.

quote.title: Quote-Ready Plan

hero.title: Event Rental Services for Every Occasion
hero.subtitle: Whether you're hosting an intimate gathering or a large coastal celebration, we help create the shelter, structure, and setting your event needs.

weddings.title: Wedding Tent Rentals
weddings.copy: Create a beautiful covered space for your ceremony, reception, cocktail hour, or full wedding weekend. Our tent rentals help turn outdoor locations into comfortable, memorable venues.

festivals.title: Festival & Community Event Rentals
festivals.copy: From vendor booths to large gathering spaces, we support festivals, markets, fundraisers, fairs, and public events with practical, weather-ready tent solutions.

private.title: Private Party Rentals
private.copy: Host birthdays, reunions, graduations, anniversaries, and backyard celebrations with confidence. We help create a comfortable event space that feels intentional and easy to enjoy.

corporate.title: Corporate Event Rentals
corporate.copy: Support company retreats, business gatherings, product launches, and branded events with polished tent setups that keep guests comfortable and the event looking professional.

setup.title: Delivery, Setup & Breakdown
setup.copy: Make event planning easier with reliable setup and breakdown support. Our team helps handle the structure so you can focus on the experience.

beacon.title: Beacon on Broadway
beacon.copy: Hosting in Seaside? Our 2,800 sq ft climate-controlled hall holds up to 150 guests with chairs, tables, and a built-in bar included.

catering.title: Pacific North Catering
catering.copy: From buffet and pasta bars to chef-attended stations and bartending, we bring the food, drinks, and service to your tent or venue.

services.tailoredBanner: Need something tailored to your event?

hero.title: About Pacific North Events & Tents
hero.subtitle: Helping Oregon Coast events come together with dependable rentals, thoughtful planning, and weather-ready setups.

story.title: Local Events Deserve Local Support
story.body: Pacific North Events & Tents was created to help people host better outdoor events along the Oregon Coast. We understand that coastal celebrations need flexible planning, reliable equipment, and a team that knows how important every detail feels when the big day arrives.

venues.title: More Than Tents
venues.body: Alongside our tent and rental services, we're proud to offer two complementary experiences designed to make event planning simpler. Beacon on Broadway is our beautifully restored 2,800 sq ft venue in downtown Seaside — perfect for weddings, receptions, corporate gatherings, and celebrations that want a built-in setting with historic charm. For events that need full-service hospitality, our catering team brings buffet menus, chef stations, bartending, and beverage service to your chosen location.

reliable.title: Reliable Setup
reliable.text: Dependable delivery, setup, and breakdown support so your event starts with confidence.

weather.title: Weather-Ready Planning
weather.text: Outdoor events need smart shelter. We help customers plan for comfort in changing coastal conditions.

flexible.title: Flexible Event Support
flexible.text: From intimate gatherings to larger celebrations, we help match the setup to the event.

local.title: Local, Friendly Service
local.text: We care about helping customers create memorable experiences without unnecessary stress.

recommender.metaTitle: AI Tent Planner | Pacific North Events & Tents
recommender.metaDesc: Free AI Tent Planner. Get a custom tent size recommendation, equipment checklist, and blueprint-style event layout in minutes.
recommender.heroTitle: Find the Right Setup for Your Event
recommender.heroSubtitle: Answer a few quick questions and our AI will recommend a complete tent, table, chair, and equipment plan — plus a blueprint of your layout.
recommender.intro: Every event is different. We'll review your inventory needs across tents, tables, chairs, and specialty items so you have a complete picture before requesting a quote.

fields.eventType: What type of event are you planning?
fields.eventLocation: Where will the event be held? *
fields.eventLocationPlaceholder: Venue name, backyard, park, beach area, business location, etc.
fields.outdoorIndoor: Is the event outdoors, indoors, or partially covered?
fields.guestCount: How many guests are you expecting? *
fields.setupType: What kind of setup do you need?
fields.seatedGuests: Will guests be seated at tables?
fields.tableStyle: What table style do you prefer?
fields.foodService: Will there be food or catering under the tent?
fields.dancing: Do you need space for dancing?
fields.extras: Will there be a bar, gift table, DJ, band, or stage?
fields.rentalItems: What rental items are you interested in?
fields.surface: What type of surface will the tent be set up on?
fields.weatherExposure: Is the location exposed to wind or coastal weather?
fields.sidewalls: Would you like sidewalls for extra weather protection?
fields.afterSunset: Will the event continue after sunset?
fields.message: Anything else we should know about your event?

buttons.sendForQuote: Send This Recommendation for a Quote

loading.title: Designing your event setup…
loading.subtitle: Our AI is reviewing inventory and drafting your blueprint. This usually takes 15–30 seconds.

error.title: We couldn't generate your recommendation
error.generic: Something went wrong on our end.
error.retryHint: Your answers are saved below. Click "Generate My Setup" again to retry, or "Talk to Us" and we'll build a setup manually.

results.thanksTrail: Based on your answers, here's what we'd recommend.
results.atGlanceSub: A quick summary of what you told us.
results.blueprintNote: Conceptual sketch — final placement confirmed during quoting.
results.recommendedSetupSub: A complete inventory selection across every category. Quantities are an estimate.
results.disclaimer: This is an AI-generated estimate. Final tent size, quantities, and equipment may change based on your venue, surface, layout, weather, and availability. No pricing is shown — request a quote for confirmed pricing.
results.dontLoseDesc: Create a free account to save this plan and access it anytime. We'll save it automatically once you sign in.

notSureYet.title: Not Sure Yet? That's Okay.
notSureYet.desc: You don't need to know every detail before reaching out. If you have a date, a location, and a rough guest count, we can help guide the rest.

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

chat.subheader: Ask a question or get help choosing the right setup.
chat.opening: Hi there! I'm here to help plan your event — tent sizes, beach setups, rentals, or a quote. What are you thinking about?
chat.welcomeBack: Good to see you back. Any of your saved plans ready for a quote? You can send one in a couple of clicks from your account.

pageHints.planner: You are already on the AI Tent Planner. Fill out the form and it will build your tent plan, equipment checklist, and a blueprint-style layout.
pageHints.savedPlan: If this is the setup you like, use Request Quote for This Plan to send these exact details to the team.
pageHints.account: You can request a quote from any saved plan. Open the plan you want and click Request Quote.
pageHints.rentals: Browse rental categories here, or use the planner if you are not sure what you need.
pageHints.contact: You can send a quote request here. Adding event date, location, and guest count helps the team respond faster.

answers.tent_size: Tent size depends on your guest count, seating style, food setup, dancing, weather exposure, and surface. The fastest way to get a good starting point is our AI Tent Planner — it suggests a tent size, equipment checklist, and a blueprint-style layout.
answers.beach_event: Yes, beach events are possible, but they take extra planning for wind, sand, anchoring, cleaning, access, and weather protection. For beach setups, water barrels and sidewalls are often recommended depending on the location and exposure.
answers.sidewalls: Sidewalls help when an event is exposed to wind, rain, or cooler coastal weather. For beach or open coastal setups, sidewalls add protection while keeping guests comfortable.
answers.anchoring: For sand, concrete, asphalt, or anywhere staking is not allowed, water barrels or alternate anchoring may be needed. Final anchoring depends on the surface, weather exposure, and site rules.
answers.inventory: We can help with tents and canopies, tables, chairs, dance floor sections, stage sections, a PA system, a portable bar, chafing dishes, sidewalls, anchoring, delivery, setup, and breakdown. Availability varies by date, so the best next step is to request a quote.
answers.tables_chairs: We offer 60" round tables, 30" round cocktail tables, 8 foot rectangular tables, and white folding chairs. Counts depend on your guest list and layout.
answers.dance_floor: Dance floors are available in sections so the size can be matched to your guest count and tent footprint.
answers.stage_sound: We offer 6x8 stage sections and a Bluetooth PA system with a mic. Final sizing depends on the venue and use case.
answers.quote_request: You can request a quote directly, or use the AI Tent Planner first to create a custom event plan. If you already have a saved plan, you can request a quote from that exact plan.
answers.saved_plans: Open your saved plan, preview the PDF, or open the PDF Viewer. Then click Request Quote for This Plan to send the exact plan to the business for follow-up.
answers.account: In your account you can save up to 3 active event plans, review past plans, and request a quote from any of them.
answers.contact: You can reach the team through the contact page with your event date, location, and a short description. The team follows up with pricing and logistics.
answers.delivery_setup: Yes, delivery, setup, and breakdown can be included depending on the event location, rental items, and availability.
answers.availability: Availability depends on the date, items, and location. The fastest way to confirm is to request a quote so the team can check the calendar.
answers.plan_event: Great — the AI Tent Planner walks you through event type, date, guest count, seating, surface, food, dancing, weather exposure, and extras, then builds a recommendation you can save, download, and send for a quote.
answers.unknown: That is a great question. The best next step is to request a quote so the team can review your event details, or use the AI Tent Planner to build a plan first.

hero.title: Beacon on Broadway
hero.subtitle: A beautifully restored 2,800 sq ft event hall in the heart of downtown Seaside — owned and operated by Pacific North Events & Tents. Weddings, receptions, corporate gatherings, and celebrations of every kind find a home here.

story.title: A landmark space, lovingly restored
story.body1: Beacon on Broadway sits in one of Seaside's most recognizable buildings — a historic downtown structure that has anchored Broadway for generations. We restored the upstairs hall into a warm and flexible event space that feels both classic and current: original architectural lines, soft modern lighting, and an open floor that can shift from intimate dinner to dance-floor in an evening.
story.body2: Because the venue is owned and run by Pacific North Events & Tents, every booking comes with the same team that handles our tents, tables, linens, and coordination across the Oregon Coast. Add what you need, leave what you don't, and we'll make it work in the room.

included.title: Furnished, climate-controlled, ready to host
included.body: The hall comes set with chairs, tables, climate control, and elevator access — so most events arrive, decorate, and celebrate without renting a single extra piece. Need linens, lighting, or a bar package? We'll add it from our in-house inventory.

pricing.title: Simple, seasonal rates
pricing.note: Rates are starting points for the venue only. Add-on rentals, staffing, and custom packages quoted on request.

visit.title: Downtown Seaside, steps from the Prom
visit.body: Beacon on Broadway is right on Broadway, the main artery connecting downtown Seaside to the beach. Walkable hotels, restaurants, and parking surround the venue — perfect for guests traveling in for the weekend.

cta.title: Plan your event at Beacon
cta.body: Tell us your date, headcount, and vibe. We'll come back with availability, a venue hold, and a full quote including any rentals you need.

hero.title: Taking your catered event above expectations
hero.subtitle: Buffet menus, chef-attended stations, and bartending services on the Oregon Coast.

common.horsdoeuvresNote: +$5 per person for each item ordered

bartending.title: Bartending Services
bartending.body: Looking for traditional bartending services for your event? From fruity cocktails to hard liquors, from champagne to non-alcoholic beverages, our experienced mixologists are on hand to elevate your occasion into an affair to remember.
bartending.note: Bartending is currently only offered in combination with our food catering packages. Ask for pricing.

catering.finePrint: All prices are based on a 2-hour service and 100 guests. Add $5 per person for counts between 50–99. Price does not include service personnel, table linens, delivery, or service charge. Prices subject to change without notice.

cross.rentalsBody: Need rentals for your catered wedding or event? Pacific North Event & Tent Rentals can help plan the details — with over 5 years of Pacific North experience. Delivery and take-down available.
cross.venueBody: Hoping for an elegant indoor venue? A historic event space over 100 years old, right on Broadway in downtown Seaside — seats up to 150 guests.
